text.tspan: Salesforce Supported Virtual Internship Program 2025 - Philippines
has completed the following Salesforce trailhead modules
during the 8-week virtual internship program (September – November 2025).
Salesforce Fundamentals | Data & Security Modeling | Declarative Automation | Apex in Salesforce
Visualforce Pages | Lightning Web Components | Agentforce Essentials | Agentblazer Champion
